bullets: TypeORM is a TypeScript Data Mapper ORM for Node.js that also supports the Active Record pattern
Entities are defined with decorators such as @Entity, @Column, @PrimaryColumn, @ManyToOne, and @OneToMany that push metadata into a global MetadataArgsStorage
A DataSource owns the connection lifecycle and delegates to a pluggable Driver (Postgres, MySQL/MariaDB, SQL Server, Oracle, SAP HANA, SQLite variants, CockroachDB, Spanner, MongoDB)
The SelectQueryBuilder composes SQL by concatenating select, join, where, group-by, having, order-by, limit-offset, and lock expressions
A SchemaBuilder (RdbmsSchemaBuilder for relational drivers) synchronizes database schema against entity metadata, and MigrationExecutor runs versioned migrations inside a transaction
The package exposes a CLI (typeorm, typeorm-ts-node-commonjs, typeorm-ts-node-esm) for generating and running migrations and other operations
